visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with dark hair, wearing a patterned bucket hat and an off-shoulder dark blue top, stands in a brightly lit retail warehouse aisle. She smiles broadly while holding a large, pink rabbit-shaped plush cushion with soft white accents. Behind her, rows of cardboard boxes and warehouse shelves stacked with merchandise like electronics and toys are visible. (2) The scene cuts as the woman picks up a light grey penguin-shaped cushion from a large box. She touches and strokes the fabric to show its texture, her hands moving deliberately across the soft material. The background shows distant shoppers and various product displays under the bright, even fluorescent lighting of the store. (3) She transitions to holding a light blue elephant-shaped cushion. Using both hands, she demonstrates the cushion's versatility by folding the sides and showing how buttons can be fastened to secure it into a triangular backrest shape. Her facial expressions remain animated and cheerful as she interacts with the product. (4) The woman leans her head against the flat version of the blue cushion, simulating its use as a pillow or mat. She then demonstrates its use as a backrest by leaning her back against the folded version. The lighting is consistent and bright, emphasizing the pastel colors and soft textures of the cushions. (5) In the final phase, she holds the blue elephant cushion and looks directly at the camera with a wide smile, giving two thumbs up. The background remains the busy interior of the warehouse store, with depth showing other aisles and shoppers.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: Costco Wholesale. [Slogan]: 699元很值得. [Variety]: 動物涼感 兩用坐墊. (2) [Subtitle]: 你看有兔子的形狀. (3) [Subtitle]: 還有企鵝. (4) [Subtitle]: 他顏色好好看喔. [Subtitle]: 是拿鐵的顏色. (5) [Subtitle]: 以及大象. (6) [Subtitle]: 哪他這個很涼 就很舒服. (7) [Subtitle]: 最重要是他捲起來呢. [Subtitle]: 你就可以當靠枕. (8) [Subtitle]: 他這裡有扣子 可以把他綁起來. (9) [Subtitle]: 變成三角靠枕. (10) [Subtitle]: 然後放著可以當 枕頭或者是躺墊喔. (11) [Subtitle]: 有小孩或者是 你喜歡涼涼的. [Subtitle]: 都超棒的. (12) [Subtitle]: 這很厚實耶. (13) [Subtitle]: 感覺也可以給 寵物當床墊. (14) [Slogan]: 699元. (15) [Subtitle]: 很不錯. (16) [Subtitle]: 這個推推 夏天來了.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, approximately 2 blurry shoppers in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair, wearing a dark blue off-shoulder top, blue denim jeans, and a grey and white patterned bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a large warehouse-style retail store (Costco), featuring tall industrial shelves, stacks of cardboard boxes containing various products like electronics and toys, and bright fluorescent overhead lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking with high energy and an enthusiastic tone. The speech is accompanied by an upbeat, bouncy electronic BGM with a steady 124 BPM rhythm. A very faint indoor room tone provides a quiet background floor. (2) A sharp, bright 'ding' sound effect triggers a new phase as the speaker emphasizes the product's cooling features. The BGM maintains a consistent playful texture with light synthesizer melodies. The vocal intensity remains at a cheerful conversational level. (3) A subtle 'pop' sound effect occurs as text appears on screen. The speaker describes the multi-functional aspects of the cushion with rising intonation. Faint rustling sounds from handling the soft cushion fabric are briefly audible beneath the dominant voice and music. (4) The audio continues with high-arousal narration until the very end, where the BGM slightly fades out during the speaker's final recommendation. The production remains clear with a high signal-to-noise ratio throughout.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature 1 -> Feature 2 -> Transformation Demo -> Usage Scenarios -> Price/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional vlog intended to showcase and recommend a specific cooling animal-shaped cushion sold at Costco for 699 TWD. It highlights the variety of characters (rabbit, penguin, elephant), the pleasant cooling sensation of the material, and its dual-use functionality as both a flat mat and a folded backrest.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is physically inside a Costco store, clearly showing the brand logo, product pricing, and making a direct recommendation to buy the product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-arousal social media editing with frequent subtitles and a playful BGM to appeal to casual shoppers looking for summer comfort products.
